settings.heading: Fibre Trophies in Bulk — Lightweight & Affordable
settings.subheading: Lightweight fibre trophies for school sports days, local tournaments and high-volume events — bright finishes, tall heights and unbeatable per-piece pricing. Made in Bangalore, delivered across India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy makes lightweight fibre trophies from around ₹120 — the most affordable way to award tall, eye-catching trophies in bulk for school sports days and local tournaments. Free engraving, pan-India delivery. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Maximum height, minimum cost
settings.text: Fibre trophies give you dramatic height and bright metallic finishes at the lowest per-piece price — which is why they're the default for school sports days, gully tournaments and any event awarding dozens or hundreds of trophies. They're light to ship and easy to hand out, and still take engraved name plates for a personal touch.

settings.title: Lowest per-piece price
settings.text: The most budget-friendly trophy for high-volume events.

settings.title: Tall & eye-catching
settings.text: Impressive height and bright finishes for the photo moment.

settings.title: Lightweight
settings.text: Easy and cheap to ship in large quantities.

settings.title: Engraved name plates
settings.text: Add recipient and event details affordably.

settings.question: How cheap can fibre trophies get in bulk?
settings.answer: For large orders, small fibre trophies start near ₹120 and fall further with quantity. Tell us your count for an exact per-piece rate.

settings.question: Are fibre trophies good quality?
settings.answer: They're light and not as premium as metal or crystal, but they look bright and tall in photos and are perfect for high-volume, budget-sensitive events.

settings.question: Can you engrave each trophy?
settings.answer: Yes — engraved name plates with recipient, category and event are added affordably.

settings.heading: Need fibre trophies for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
